rationale: First widget on the FIRST recital line: street address where the corporation was originally organized. Place-of-organization is at most a single street address (no apt/suite split).
Town of original organization. Form text says 'State of Maine' immediately after, so state is implicit and not a widget.
Day component of original organization date. Form splits date into 3 widgets (day/month/year) rather than a single ISO date — mapping mirrors widget composition.
Month component (free-text, e.g., 'July').
Year component (4-digit).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The name of said corporation is now
rationale: Current legal name of the nonprofit corporation. Maps to the standard entity.name (not entity.original_name — that is FOURTH).
First (oldest) prior name in the chronological history table.
Date of first name change (paired with 981a7 by row y-position).
Second prior name.
Date of second name change.
Third prior name.
Date of third name change.
Fourth prior name.
Date of fourth name change.
Fifth (most recent) prior name. Row 5 is the last inline row; form note says 'Attach additional page(s) if necessary.'
Date of fifth name change.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The name of the corporation was originally [line 1]
rationale: Original (founding) name of the corporation. Line-1 widget on the FOURTH recital.

Line-2 continuation widget for FOURTH original-name string. Maps to the same canonical key — synth/filler must split a long original_name across the two widgets, or leave 981a18 empty when the name fits on line 1.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The original purposes of the corporation at the time of incorporation were:
rationale: Free-text description of the original corporate purpose at incorporation (singular, matches MNPCA-6 convention for purpose strings). Distinct from current SIXTH purposes — original purposes are historical.

label_verbatim: [ ] The corporation is organized as a public benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes:
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1 (y=266.9); enum_select value 'public_benefit'. Public-benefit checkbox. Enum value: 'public_benefit'. Maps to the same single canonical key as Check Box5 — see MNPCA-6 convention. SIXTH header reads '("X" one box only.)'.
Free-text public-benefit purpose statement (only required when entity.nonprofit_type='public_benefit'). Singular per MNPCA-6 convention.

label_verbatim: [ ] The corporation is organized as a mutual benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes or, if not for all such purposes, then for all purposes permitted under 13-B MRSA
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1 (y=400.7); enum_select value 'mutual_benefit'. Mutual-benefit checkbox. Enum value: 'mutual_benefit'. Same canonical key as Check Box4.
Free-text mutual-benefit purpose statement (empty if mutual benefit covers 'all purposes permitted under 13-B'). Singular per MNPCA-6 convention.

label_verbatim: [ ] Directors (including trustees, governors, managers, etc.), or if no Directors,
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1 (y=567.5); enum_select value 'directors'. Director-managed checkbox. Enum value: 'directors'. SEVENTH header reads '("X" one box only.)' — exactly one of Check Box6/Check Box7 selected.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1 (y=592.5); enum_select value 'members'. Member-managed checkbox. Enum value: 'members'. Same canonical key as Check Box6.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: Said corporation is now located at [street]
rationale: Current street address (where corporation is now located). Distinct from FIRST original_organization_address (historical).
Current town. State is 'State of Maine' implicit (not a widget).
Current county. The county field is unusual — not normally part of standard mailing addresses — but is required by the recital text.

label_verbatim: NINTH: The number of officers is [count]
rationale: Numeric count of officers. Should match the populated officer_<role>.name slots below (typically 4: President, Vice-President, Secretary/Clerk, Treasurer).

Name of the President. Role-keyed officer roster (matches NP_MNP-9 convention: officer_<role>.{name,address} where role is fixed by the form's row label). Distinct from CORP_MBCA-12's user-entered capacity pattern.
Name of the Vice-President. Vice-President is optional in 13-B governance but the form provides a fixed slot.
Name of the Secretary or Clerk. Form label 'Secretary or Clerk' — Maine 13-B uses 'clerk' as the canonical role name but this form accepts either.
Name of the Treasurer.
Date of signature (page 2 signature block).

Printed name of the President signer. Per-role signer pattern: the form has fixed signature slots labeled (President) and (Secretary/Clerk), so the canonical key uses the role name. Adjacent to the wet-ink (signature) line which has no widget.
Printed name of the Secretary/Clerk signer. Pairs with 981a35; 13-B §704 requires the corporation's clerk to attest most recital filings.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day' ($50 additional).
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day' ($100 additional).
Total enclosed fees.
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Persistent annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
